Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three affected orders have been refunded and customers notified. Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
